provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the District Councils (Establishment) Order.

provisions.title: Establishment of District Councils
provisions.content: With effect from the first day of October, 1983, there shall be established the District Councils set out in the Schedule to this Order, each in the area of the district whose name it bears, and as respectively specified in the Schedule to the Local Government (Establishment of District Councils) Notice 1 . 1 G.N. No. 42 of 1983

provisions.title: Area of District Councils
provisions.content: The area of each District Council established by paragraph 2 shall consist of the wards and villages respectively specified opposite to the district in question in the Second and Third Columns of the Second Schedule to this Order.

provisions.title: Name of District Councils
provisions.content: With effect from the first day of October, 1983, the District Council established in each of the said districts shall be known by the title specified in respect of it in the Schedule to this Order, which contains the name of the district in question, followed respectively by the words "District Council".

provisions.title: Official seal of council
provisions.content: (1) Each District Council shall, at the first meeting after its establishment, by resolution establish such device, bearing its official title and any other particulars or matter, as it may determine, to be the official seal of that Council. (2) The establishment of the seal shall after being approved by the Minister, be notified by publication of the seal in the Gazette . (3) Until the official seal of the Council is published in the Gazette , each District Council shall use a rubber stamp device, designed in such form or shape as the Council may deem appropriate, as its Official seal.

provisions.title: Assets, property and other matters of council
provisions.content: Each District Council shall, upon its establishment, take over and be responsible for such assets, property, and other matters as are, and in the manner, specified in the relevant provisions of Part II of the Local Government Finances Act 2 . 2 Cap. 290

provisions.title: Dissolution of district development councils and transitional
provisions.content: (1) With effect from the first day of October, 1983, every District Development Council previously existing within the district in whose area a District Council is established shall stand dissolved and shall not, at any subsequent time or period exercise any function in relation to that area under any other written law. (2) Notwithstanding the dissolution of a District Development Council previously existing in the area of a district which a District Council is established, every by-law, rule, regulation, direction, order or decision made, issued or given by it immediately before its dissolution and which is for the time being in force on the first day of October, 1983, shall continue in operation until it is revoked, rescinded, amended or replaced by the District Council.
